originalAlarm.description: Use of memory after it is freed

sanitizedDescription: Use of memory after it is freed
reasoning: Memory management bug at bc0ffc0e971.c L43 inside ENABLE_FEATURE_CLEAN_UP block — marked // ERROR as a VBDB-known bug. PC = (STRICT_ANSI AND CLEAN_UP) OR (!STRICT_ANSI AND CLEAN_UP) simplifies to CLEAN_UP only (STRICT_ANSI cancels out). No restrictive library macros remain. Correctly constrained.
